default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance steady (\~400 sessions/week); real estate, finance top performers](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Shifting strategy: deeper, product-oriented content showcasing Datagrid capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Need to align thought leadership posts with Thiago's activities and company calendar](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Planning to scale content strategy, potentially exploring publication angle](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing Update

  - [Target: 571 articles live by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Publishing block due to CMS integration issues](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Articles generated, awaiting bug fix](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [No major impact on performance expected](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

### Performance Review

  - [Q2 ending: broadly experimented, now evaluating effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [\~400 sessions/week, views stable](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Top performers: AI agents for real estate and finance](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Real estate consistently best, e-commerce volatile but gaining](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Sales and insurance clusters steady performers](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Older topics (e.g., AI agents for attention) still performing well](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Shift from high-level to deeper, product-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Focus on showcasing Datagrid's capabilities (e.g., data transibilities, special agents)](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Aim to enhance conversions through specific use cases](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Aligning with industry/use case pages for future website redesign](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Thought Leadership Posting

  - [Current challenge: posts disconnected from Thiago's activities](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Need to align with product launches, webinars, and ongoing work](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Suggestion: Share marketing calendar to sync post topics/timing](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Goal: Achieve authentic voice and relevant, timely content](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Additional Workstreams

  - [Link building: Update expected next week, progressing as planned](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Assembly posting schedule on track](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Exploring publication angle for content scaling](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share marketing calendar (Kaitlin) to align thought leadership posts](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Vivek to discuss interview process improvements with Mara and Rafael](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [Continue refining Thiago's voice in thought leadership posts](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Brainstorm content scaling strategies, including publication angle](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Prepare presentation on new content strategies for upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=837.0)
  - [Proceed with scheduled thought leadership call (Joey to lead if Mara unavailable)](https://fathom.video/share/DfQ-xnypRFbgEWBqxEnmHr-7hxCW17hT?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

action_items.description: Drop msg in channel re rescheduling July meetings to earlier hrs due to Tiago's Europe travel
Discuss w/ Mara & Rafael re aligning Thiago's posts w/ his current work, product launches
Share marketing calendar (from Ocean DB) w/ GrowthX team to sync Thiago's posts w/ events, product launches
